      • set_global_seed()

Submodules¶

xanesnet.analyze module¶

Entry point and argument parser for analysis runs.

xanesnet.analyze.parse_args(args)[source]¶

Parse command-line arguments for the analysis entry point.

Parameters:

args (list[str]) – Raw command-line argument strings.

Return type:

Namespace

Returns:

Parsed argument namespace.

xanesnet.analyze.main(args)[source]¶

Run the full analysis pipeline.

Parses arguments, configures prompt behavior, loads configuration, sets up the run directory, and delegates to the analyze core function.

Parameters:

args (list[str]) – Raw command-line argument strings.

Return type:

None

xanesnet.cli module¶

Command-line interface dispatcher for XANESNET (train / infer / analyze).

xanesnet.cli.main(args)[source]¶

Dispatch to the train, infer, or analyze sub-command.

Prints the XANESNET logo and routes to the appropriate sub-command entry point based on the first positional argument.

Parameters:

args (list[str]) – Raw command-line argument strings (typically sys.argv[1:]).

Raises:

ConfigError – If an unrecognised sub-command is supplied.

Return type:

None

xanesnet.core_analyze module¶

Core analysis pipeline: setup, collection, aggregation, reporting, and plotting.

xanesnet.core_analyze.analyze(config, args_namespace, save_dir)[source]¶

Run the complete analysis pipeline.

Sets up readers, selectors, collectors, aggregators, reporters, and plotters from config; executes the pipeline; and writes all outputs under save_dir.

Parameters:

  • config (Config) – Validated analysis configuration.

  • args_namespace (Namespace) – Parsed CLI arguments (must contain predictions).

  • save_dir (Path) – Root directory for all analysis outputs.

Return type:

None

xanesnet.core_infer module¶

Core inference pipeline: dataset setup, model loading, and prediction.

xanesnet.core_infer.infer(config, args_namespace, save_dir, checkpoint)[source]¶

Run the complete inference pipeline.

Builds the data source and dataset from config, restores model weights from checkpoint, and writes predictions under save_dir.

Parameters:

  • config (Config) – Validated inference configuration.

  • args_namespace (Namespace) – Parsed CLI arguments.

  • save_dir (Path) – Root directory for inference outputs.

  • checkpoint (Checkpoint) – Loaded model checkpoint.

Return type:

None

xanesnet.core_train module¶

Core training pipeline: dataset setup, strategy initialization, and model training.

xanesnet.core_train.train(config, args_namespace, save_dir)[source]¶

Run the complete training pipeline.

Builds the data source and dataset from config, resolves any automatic model fields from the prepared dataset, builds the strategy from the resolved config, runs training, and writes models, checkpoints, and metadata under save_dir.

Parameters:

  • config (Config) – Validated training configuration, possibly containing "auto" model fields supported by the resolver.

  • args_namespace (Namespace) – Parsed CLI arguments (must contain tensorboard).

  • save_dir (Path) – Root directory for all training outputs.

Return type:

None

xanesnet.infer module¶

Entry point and argument parser for inference runs.

xanesnet.infer.parse_args(args)[source]¶

Parse command-line arguments for the inference entry point.

Parameters:

args (list[str]) – Raw command-line argument strings.

Return type:

Namespace

Returns:

Parsed argument namespace.

xanesnet.infer.main(args)[source]¶

Run the full inference pipeline.

Parses arguments, configures prompt behavior, loads configuration and checkpoint, sets up the run directory, and delegates to the infer core function.

Parameters:

args (list[str]) – Raw command-line argument strings.

Return type:

None

xanesnet.train module¶

Entry point and argument parser for training runs.

xanesnet.train.parse_args(args)[source]¶

Parse command-line arguments for the training entry point.

Parameters:

args (list[str]) – Raw command-line argument strings.

Return type:

Namespace

Returns:

Parsed argument namespace.

xanesnet.train.main(args)[source]¶

Run the full training pipeline.

Parses arguments, configures prompt behavior, loads and validates configuration, sets up the run directory, and delegates to the train core function.

Parameters:

args (list[str]) – Raw command-line argument strings.

Return type:

None

xanesnet.analysis package

xanesnet
